articles.title: AI agents have security flaw
articles.summary: Many AI bots are at risk. A big problem was found in code. This could let hackers take control.
articles.impact: This flaw could let attackers take over many AI systems.

articles.title: Google Health app replaces Fitbit
articles.summary: Google's new Health app is here. It replaced the Fitbit app. Many users dislike the changes.
articles.impact: Fitbit users do not like the new AI coach and app.

articles.title: New James Bond game scores well
articles.summary: The new 007 game is out. It got high scores from reviewers. It could be a top game this year.
articles.impact: The new James Bond game is a hit with critics.

articles.title: Indie games to check out
articles.summary: Cool new indie games are out. One is Mina the Hollower. Another is a bullet-hell roguelike.
articles.impact: Two unique indie games launch for players this week.

articles.title: Nvidia Control Panel is retired
articles.summary: The Nvidia Control Panel is gone. It served users for 20 years. New drivers help recent games.
articles.impact: The long-time Nvidia Control Panel is now replaced.

articles.title: Destruction AllStars servers shut down
articles.summary: The game Destruction AllStars is gone. Its online servers are off. This happened without warning.
articles.impact: Players can no longer play Destruction AllStars online.

articles.title: Apple releases iOS 26.6 beta
articles.summary: Apple released a new beta. It's for iOS 26.6 on iPhones. Developers can test it now.
articles.impact: Developers can test the first iOS 26.6 beta.

articles.title: The Free Press launches community
articles.summary: The Free Press is starting new things. They want to build a community. This includes forums and events.
articles.impact: The Free Press is expanding with community initiatives.
